description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: build, release, and deploy. The build job runs on a matrix of Windows and Ubuntu environments with different architectures and Qt versions, checks out the code, caches and installs Qt, installs additional dependencies, creates a build environment, configures CMake, builds the project, runs tests, and optionally creates an installer. The release job creates a release on push of tags matching v*. The deploy job deploys the installer to a release on Windows.
